chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer Appln. No.S – 98 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 11.11.2022 Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State -------------- O R D E R ZAFAR AHMED RAJPUT.J.-. Mr. Asif Ali Jatoi, Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.1, which is taken on record. Through instant Criminal Transfer Application, the applicant/accused Rais Jazib S/o Rais Muhammad Akhtar seeks transfer of Sessions Case No.680/2020 (Re- The State vs. Rais Jazib) arising out of Crime No.55/2020 registered at Police Station, Hingorja under Section 395, 506/2 PPC, from the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge, Gambat, District Khairpur to any other Additional Sessions Judge of District Khairpur having jurisdiction, on the ground that the trial Court is lying vacant. 2. Learned counsel for the private respondent as well as learned Deputy Prosecutor General recorded their no objection to the grant of this application for the reason that the speedy trial is the right of every accused. 3. Considering the fact that the learned trial Court is lying vacant and, therefore, the trial is not likely to conclude expeditiously, this Criminal Transfer Application is allowed. Consequently, the Sessions Case No.680/2020 is withdrawn from the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge, Gambat with direction to learned Sessions Judge, Khairpur to assign it to any other Additional Sessions Judge in District Khairpur for disposal of aforementioned case in accordance with law.

Considering the fact that the learned trial Court is lying vacant and, therefore, the trial is not likely to conclude expeditiously, this Criminal Transfer Application is allowed. Consequently, the Sessions Case No.680/2020 is withdrawn from the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge, Gambat with direction to learned Sessions Judge, Khairpur to assign it to any other Additional Sessions Judge in District Khairpur for disposal of aforementioned case in accordance with law. Judge ARBROHI
